meta_title: For Students: Antigravity project template to Solve stuck with basic apps (Advanced Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Advanced-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: Antigravity Template: Level Up Your Student Coding Projects
content.seo_description: Stuck building basic apps? Learn to use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to build advanced, production-ready software for your portfolio.
content.answer_block: To break through the plateau of basic CRUD apps, pivot to the Antigravity project template. It enforces enterprise-grade architecture, modular design, and scalable state management. By pairing this with Claude Code, you automate boilerplate and focus on core logic, allowing you to ship professional-grade applications that stand out to recruiters.
content.intro:
You have built the to-do lists, the weather apps, and the basic clones. Yet, you feel stuck in a loop of superficial tutorials that fail to prepare you for the brutal reality of production-level engineering. The gap between a 'student project' and a 'shippable product' feels like a chasm that no amount of basic React tutorials can bridge.

Enter the Antigravity project template. This is not just a boilerplate; it is an architectural framework designed to force you into patterns used by senior engineers. By integrating this with Claude Code, you shift from being a coder who writes syntax to an architect who orchestrates systems, effectively bypassing the 'tutorial hell' that traps most developers.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish the foundation by cloning the template. This sets up your directory structure, CI/CD pipelines, and environment configs.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project using the Antigravity base template with TypeScript, modular architecture, and strict ESLint configurations.

steps.title: Define Domain-Driven Models
steps.description: Stop thinking in pages and start thinking in domains. Define your core business logic using Antigravity's domain-layer conventions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a domain entity for [Project Name] with automated validation schemas using Zod, ensuring Type safety across the entire stack.

steps.title: Implement Modular API Handlers
steps.description: Decouple your business logic from your transport layer. This ensures your app is testable and scalable.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a modular API handler for the domain model that supports dependency injection and follows the Antigravity service-layer pattern.

steps.title: Automate Integration Testing
steps.description: A project is only as good as its tests. Use Claude Code to generate high-coverage integration tests for your new services.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a suite of integration tests for the service layer using Vitest and Mock Service Worker to ensure robust API communication.

steps.title: Deploy with Production Guardrails
steps.description: Configure the deployment pipeline to include automated performance audits and security linting.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure the CI/CD workflow to include Lighthouse performance audits and static security analysis on every push.

pro_tips: Always treat your domain models as the source of truth, not the database schema.
Use Claude Code to refactor your code into smaller modules whenever a file exceeds 200 lines.
Implement dependency injection early to make unit testing trivial later in the project life cycle.
Treat environment variables as immutable secrets; never hardcode them even in development.
Automate your documentation by having Claude Code parse your JSDoc comments into a README summary.
content.next_steps: Once your app is functional, deploy it to a staging environment and run an automated performance audit. Then, iterate on a single high-impact feature to showcase your ability to maintain complex codebases.
content.conversion_block: Stop building toy apps and start building software that matters. Leverage the Antigravity template to master the architecture that real companies use. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
